title: Wrong behaviour of SQL WHERE
key_bug_features: SQL WHERE clause with NULL values in calculations
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test2 (id varchar not null, pos_start integer, pos_end integer, status boolean, PRIMARY KEY(id));
INSERT INTO test2 VALUES ('ID3', NULL, NULL, TRUE);
SELECT id FROM test2 WHERE (pos_end - pos_start) IS NOT NULL AND (pos_end - pos_start) > 0;
SELECT id FROM test2 WHERE (pos_end - pos_start) < 10 OR status IS NULL;
